CONFIRMATION OF PERFOMANCE OF MIS TECHNO BRAIN (TANZANIA) 
LIMITED 
The Government of Uganda has been implementing public financial management (PFM) 
reforms for good governance and improved service delivery. Automation of financial 
management systems in local governments is one key component of the reform under which 
the Integrated Financial Management System (IFMS) has been implemented to provide 
timely, transparent and accurate financial management information. 
A consortium led by Techno Brain (Tanzania) Limited has implemented the Integrated 
Financial Management System in 59 local governmen ts in two phases at a total contract sum 
of USD 12,977,490.63 (United States Dollars Twelve Million Nine Hundred Seventy Seven 
Thousand Four Hundred Ninety and Sixty three Cents). This project was partly funded by 
World Bank and Government of Uganda. The following modules were implemented: 
1. Budgeting and commitment. 
2. General Ledger. 
3. Cash Management. 
4. Revenue Management. 
5. Purchasing. 
6. Accounts Payable. 
7 . Inventory Management. 
8. Fixed Assets. 
Implementation was undertaken under a turnkey project which involved the following 
components which were delivered under multi-vendor model; 
1. IFMIS Application supply, configuration , customization and implementation. 
2. Supply, Installation and configuration of Servers, Workstations , WAN & LAN 
equipment. ..... -·· ~

The consortium led by Mis Techno Brain (Tanzania) Limited executed this project as required 
and all the sites are currently using the system. Thirty three (33) of the sites are currently being
